filesystem_metadata.notes: Path, stat, size, timestamps, hashes for explicit roots only.

git_explicit_repositories.notes: No writes and no diffs; AoA and abyss-stack are reference/read-only unless a repo contract says otherwise.

abyss_machine_facts.notes: Read existing storage/process/observability/ai facts and record source stat/hash provenance.

systemd_metadata.notes: No journal body capture; user and system unit states only.

podman_metadata.notes: Avoid secrets and work-container migration hazards.

manual_notes.notes: User-supplied files and explicit prompts are allowed source material.

browser_active_tab.notes: Firefox history URLs strip query/fragment; open-tab document text is captured through AT-SPI during normal browsing, with BiDi reserved for explicit diagnostics.

terminal_stdout_stderr.notes: Existing terminal output cannot be captured without a wrapper; command history and process metadata are redacted.

clipboard.notes: Text clipboard is redacted, length-limited, and hashed; binary clipboard stores type metadata only.

screenshots.notes: PNG artifacts are stored under {{ABYSS_MACHINE_SRV}}/storage/nervous/captures; index stores paths and hashes only. Automatic capture must use an invisible silent backend. Normal GNOME desktop prefers the allowlisted GNOME Shell DBus-owner route; active game/fullscreen X11 game contexts skip GNOME Shell screenshot backends and prefer non-focus X11/Xwayland window capture or grim, otherwise skip. Noisy gnome-screenshot requires explicit diagnostic opt-in.

audio_transcript_autolog.notes: Consumes the existing dictation transcript journal; does not open the microphone by itself.
